title: Signs: Reloaded
description: Improves sign consistency by adding bark-textured posts to hanging signs and standardizing sprite designs across all wood variants.
body:
# Signs: Reloaded
*Enhances the visual consistency of all sign types in Minecraft with thoughtful texture improvements. Hanging signs feature detailed bark-textured posts that match their respective wood types, while sign sprites maintain uniform design elements across all variants.*

## Features
  - Added realistic bark textures to hanging sign posts
  - Standardized sprite designs across all sign types
  - Full support for all wood variants in the game
  - Recolors jungle and spruce hanging signs

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
